name: Merchant Loans (상점 대출)
author: inggom
description: Borrow gold at the Act 1 merchant to afford an item you can't quite pay for. Taking a loan grants the Merchant's Ledger relic, and every combat injects temporary Debt cards into your draw pile — 1 at first, rising to 3 over time — that drain gold at the end of your turn. Each payment splits between interest and paying down the loan, so the debt slowly amortizes; repay the rest at any shop to clear it and remove the relic (then your credit resets and you can borrow again). Carrying debt raises other shops' prices. In co-op the debt is contagious — one player's loan seeps Debt cards into their partner's combats too. Fully localized in 14 languages.
